chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Divorce of a Woman Who Has Not Been Consummated and the Ruling on a Woman Whose Husband Passes Away Before or After Consummation

text: 4776 - وَ رُوِيَ: "أَنَّ اَلْغَنِيَّ يُمَتِّعُ بِدَارٍ أَوْ خَادِمٍ وَ اَلْوَسَطَ يُمَتِّعُ بِثَوْبٍ وَ اَلْفَقِيرَ بِدِرْهَمٍ أَوْ خَاتَمٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4776 - It is narrated: "The wealthy man should provide a house or a servant as a parting gift, the middle-income man should provide clothing, and the poor man should provide a silver coin or a ring."
